test_cases.description: Rooftop farm opening — full media access, first in state, photography permitted
test_cases.input_summary: Greenway Urban Farms opening Oregon's first inner-city rooftop farm in Portland; CEO speaker; full photo access; RSVP to comms manager
test_cases.notes: All five WHAT/WHEN/WHERE/WHO/WHY fields present and concise. Lead sentence answers the key news peg. Logistics scannable at a glance. RSVP block correctly formatted. Word count within target range.

test_cases.description: Government minister press conference — policy announcement, restricted media access, accreditation required
test_cases.input_summary: State housing minister announcing affordable housing target increase; Ministry of Housing press conference; restricted to accredited parliamentary media; embargoed briefing notes available on arrival
test_cases.notes: Correctly noted accreditation requirement in RSVP section. Minor fluency issue: the WHY field ran to three sentences, breaking the scannable format. Professionalism note: output used 'groundbreaking announcement' in the context paragraph — not flagged as unsupported, which is a limitation. Consistency: all provided facts reproduced correctly.

test_cases.description: Sports team unveils new kit — commercial event, photo opportunity only, no editorial access
test_cases.input_summary: Northern Athletic FC unveiling new home strip at club stadium; photo opportunity only, no interviews; two first-team players attending; event is commercial partnership launch with sports brand
test_cases.notes: Lower professionalism and actionability scores: output did not make sufficiently clear that the event was a commercial photo call with no editorial interview access — this distinction is critical for journalists deciding whether to assign a photographer vs a reporter. A revision pass was made to add an explicit 'Photo opportunity only — no spokesperson interviews available' note under the WHAT field. Revised scores: professionalism 4, actionability 4, mean 4.17.
